top_signals.title: S&P 500 Traders Grapple With Swings Reminiscent of Tariff Tumult
top_signals.summary: The S&P 500 Index swung violently on Tuesday, almost wiping out a 2.3% plunge to close modestly lower, as investors reacted to headlines on the Iran war and looked ahead to figures that may show inflation accelerating.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BDC Tied to Dell-Backed Bank Sells $300 Million High-Grade Bonds
top_signals.summary: A private credit fund managed by BDT & MSD Partners LLC — the merchant bank tied to billionaire Michael Dell — sold $300 million of investment-grade bonds on Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump family got about $500M from crypto venture — but investors saw steep losses
top_signals.summary: Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. celebrated a deal with Alt5 Sigma that generated roughly $500 million for the Trump family. The company's shares are down 93%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: New Veeam vulnerability exposes backup servers to RCE attacks
top_signals.summary: Veeam has released security updates to patch a critical Backup & Replication security flaw that can be exploited to gain remote code execution (RCE) on domain-joined backup servers. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
